'''Draukyze''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Draukyze system/Legends|Draukyze system]] of the [[Thanium sector/Legends|Thanium sector]].

==History==
The planet was absorbed into [[Xim's empire|Xim's Empire]] as [[Xim/Legends|he]] expanded his borders from the [[Kingdom of Cron]].

Draukyze was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] member world hit by a single [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] in a hit and fade [[Raid on the Draukyze system|attack]] early in the [[Thrawn campaign|Thrawn crisis]], months before the New Republic discovered the existence of the [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]]. The attack was a thing of rumor among smugglers, and was reported to [[Talon Karrde]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] by their copilot, [[Lachton]], who was present at a [[Attack on Bpfassh|similar attack]] at [[Bpfassh]].

{{Planet-stub}}
